recommendations.title: Big Business

recommendations.title: Gad Gone Wild
recommendations.overview: French comic Gad Elmaleh regales a Montreal crowd with tales of awkward mix-ups and baffling customs he's encountered since moving to the U.S.

recommendations.title: Still/Born

recommendations.title: The Skeleton Twins
recommendations.overview: Estranged twins Maggie and Milo coincidentally cheat death on the same day, prompting them to reunite and confront the reasons their lives went so wrong. As the twins' reunion reinvigorates them, they realize the key to fixing their lives may just li

recommendations.title: Nightmare at Shadow Woods
recommendations.overview: Twins Todd and Terry seem like sweet boys -- that is, until one of them takes an axe to the face of a fellow patron at the local drive-in.

recommendations.title: Feed
recommendations.overview: Olivia and Matthew Grey, 18-year-old twins born into a world of privilege and high expectations. There are almost no boundaries between them - even their dreams are connected.

recommendations.title: Little Big League
recommendations.overview: When the owner of the Minnesota Twins passes away, he bequeaths the team to his preteen grandson. The newly minted head honcho quickly appoints himself manager, causing unrest in an organization that struggles to take orders from a 12-year-old.

recommendations.title: Incendies

recommendations.title: The Parent Trap

recommendations.title: The Associate
